title: extract_field accepts malformed JSON numbers in non-extracted fields
description: json_skip_number does not reject 1e, 1e+, 1E- (exponent with no digits). Trigger: secret value like {"bad":1e,"password":"hunter2"} — extract_field("password") succeeds on invalid JSON. The scanner claims to be a strict JSON parser but silently accepts malformed numeric values in skipped fields. This misrepresents the safety contract: if extract_field is used to validate that a secret is well-formed JSON before trusting it, it will pass garbage.
